description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The exterior is finished in a combination of light gray, beige, and dark gray panels, with vertical window strips and recessed balconies on the upper floor. The front facade includes two main entryways, each accessed by a set of concrete steps, and is accented by metal railings and a wide, open terrace on the ground floor. The rear side of the house has a large balcony running the length of the building, supported by columns and protected by railings. The windows are arranged in symmetrical vertical strips, providing ample natural light to the interior. The overall structure is elevated slightly above ground level, with staircases and platforms on both sides for access.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, symmetrical vertical windows, and recessed balconies, finished in gray and beige panels. The design features prominent entry steps, metal railings, and a wide rear terrace.
description_view_0: Side view showing three vertical window strips, a flat roof, and a staircase leading to a side platform.
description_view_1: Front view with two main entryways, concrete steps, recessed balconies, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with similar window strips and a side staircase.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying a wide balcony spanning the building, supported by columns and featuring multiple glass doors.
attribute_entryway_design: Dual main entryways with concrete steps, recessed doors, and metal railings, no porch or overhang.
